snippet.title: Sheesha (Official Music Video) | Mitta Ror ft. Swara Verma | Sorab Bedi | Niharika Tiwari
snippet.description:
The internet has spoken and we have listened. The real “owners of the song” have all assembled together! Watch Sorab Bedi and Niharika Tiwari join Mitta Ror for the Official Music Video of the viral hit song Sheesha.

Audio Credits:
Performed by Mitta Ror, Swara Verma
Written and Composed by Mitta Ror
Music Production by Yeah Ishwar

Video Credits:
Starring Sorab Bedi, Niharika Tiwari & Mitta Ror
Director - Teji Sandhu
Cheif Ad - Sourav Dheer 
1st Ad - Jass
Dop - Munish Shunty
Editor - CutsbyNav ( Navraj)
Colorist - Mr Luv
Production- Kainth Production ( Gagan)
Choreographer- Amit syal
Jib - Sonu
Makeup - Guru and Team
Hair - Sahil ( Barber king )
Art director - Kaka Art
Costume- Rajat Manchanda
Camera - cenidream
Focus puller - Gaggu
Editor - Cuts By Nav
VFX  - Rahul (the.vfx.wala)
BTS - J Singh & Ashu Dadwal
USA production: 
Front Line Production @spicegridproductions @gigipanwar
Assistant DOP @stablefilms

Lyrics:

Teri Aage Peechhe Laage
Sun Daura Chhori Ka
Rang Tere Gela Match Hove
Gora Chhori Ka
Jo Rakhega Bacha Ke
Duniya Ki Nazra Te
Tere Kar Deyun Hawaale
Kala Dora Chhori Ka
Jib Te Re Pakda
yo Hath Tanne Mera
Thodi Thodi Main To
Ghabrandi Phiru Su

Sharmandi Phiru Su

Sharmandi Phiru Su

Meri Jaan Laag Gi
Teri Pasand Ke Suit
Main Siman Laag Gi
Oh Din Dholi Mein
Tu Le Gaya Meri Jaan Kadh Ke
Pyaar Aale Gaane Main To
Gaan Laagi
Ho Chadheya Isa Pyaar Aala
Bhoot Mere Pe
Teri Photo Wallpaper Pe

Aakhya Me Aankh Manne Ghali Jo Beran
Teri Jhuk Gayi Thi Aankh
Sharma Ke Ne Beran
Gora Gora Chaam Tera
Kaale Kaale Baal Tere
Doob Gaya Main Billi Billi
Aankhya Mein Bairan
Teri Hansi Ke Hansi

Is Chhore Ke Dil Pe

ho Aankhya Aalya Maarya

snippet.title: Dhurandhar The Revenge Official Hindi Trailer | Ranveer S | Aditya D | In Cinemas 19 March 2026
snippet.description:
Ab Pakistan ka mustakbil, Hindustan tay karega
Dhurandhar The Revenge Trailer Out Now.  Book Now for Paid Previews on 18th March only.

Releasing worldwide on 19 March, on Gudi Padwa, Ugadi, and Eid.

Jio Studios presents
A B62 Studios Production

An Aditya Dhar Film
DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE 

Written, Directed and Produced by Aditya Dhar
Produced by Jyoti Deshpande
Produced by Lokesh Dhar

Trailer Scored, Composed and Produced by Shashwat Sachdev

Ari Ari Song Credits: 
Composed, Arranged and Programmed by Shashwat Sachdev
Vocals: Navtej Singh Rehal (Bombay Rockers), Khan Saab, Jasmine Sandlas & Sudhir Yaduvanshi
Rap Performed and written by Reble, Token 
Lyrics by Irshad Kamil, Bombay Rockers
Score Producer Adam Lucas
Music Supervisor: Adarsh Vishwakarma

Director of Photography - Vikash Nowlakha
Editor: Shivkumar V. Panicker
Music and Background Score: Shashwat Sachdev
Casting Director: Mukesh Chhabra, CSA
Executive Producer: Rahul H. Gandhi
Character & Prosthetics Designer: Preetisheel Singh D’Souza
Sound Designer: Bishwadeep Chatterjee
Costume Designer: Smriti Chauhan
Action Directors: Aejaz Gulab, Sea Young Oh, Yannick Ben, Ramazan Bulut
Choreographer: Vijay Ganguly
Additional Screenplay: Shivkumar V. Panicker, Ojas Gautam
Additional Production Designer: Rupin Suchak
Associate Director & Second Unit Director: Rohun Rege
Chief Assistant Director: Sameer Sadhwani
Director’s Assistant: Ojas Gautam
Creative Producer: Aarsh Vora
Assistant Producer: Shweta Vora
Line Producer: Naseer Ahmed Khan
Research Consultant: Aditya Raj Kaul, Dibya S.
Associate Editor: Sumit Dhole, Juhi Gopalakrishnan
Marketing Manager: Chelsea Gupta
Production Sound Mixers: Manas Bal, Prabal Pradhan
Post Producer: Gautmik
Re-Recording Mixer: Justin Jose K (CAS)
VFX Supervisor: Dhruti Ranjan Sahoo
VFX Studios: Envision VFX, Philm CGI, Redefine, R2 VFX
DI Studio: Redefine
DI Colourist: Ashirwad Hadkar (ISC)
Digital Agency: White Rivers Media
PR Agency: Communique Film PR
Marketing Agency: MAX Marketing Ltd
Teaser and Trailer Editor: Ojas Gautam
Dubbing & Localization: Annapurna Studios
Visual Promotion: Jayesh Shikarkhane & Team
Publicity Design: Ma & Th (Marching Ants & Trigger Happy)

Jio Studios Team
COO & CFO: Priyanka Chaudhary
CEO Production and Distribution: Deepak Sharma
Chief Legal Officer: Dipti Kotak
PR Head: Amita Naidu

Dhurandhar The Revenge introduces Jaskirat Singh Rangi, tracing the chain of events that compel him to become Hamza Ali Mazari, and follows his rise as he operates deep inside Pakistan. The film is set to return this time in Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada and Malayalam.

19 March 2026
In Cinemas Worldwide
A Jio Studios Release

snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla -Official Teaser | Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa, Priyadarshan |In Cinemas 10 Apr
snippet.description:
Laughter, screams, and surprises are waiting inside the Bangla. Dare to enter? 🤣🧟‍♀️
#BhoothBanglaTeaser out now!

#BhoothBangla in cinemas on 10th April 2026 👻

Bhooth Bangla reunites #AkshayKumar with acclaimed director #Priyadarshan after 14 years, promising a delightful blend of comedy, horror, and thrill.

Balaji Telefilms Ltd. in association with Cape Of Good Films present
Bhooth Bangla

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav, Tabu, Wamiqa Gabbi, Jisshu Sengupta, Manoj Joshi, Mithila Palkar, Asrani Ji, Rajesh Sharma

snippet.title: Dune: Part Three | Official Teaser Trailer
snippet.description:
Experience the epic conclusion. Dune: Part Three only in theaters December 18 #DuneMovie #FilmedforIMAX

Directed by Denis Villeneuve and written by Villeneuve and Brian K. Vaughan, Dune: Part Three is based on the novel Dune Messiah by Frank Herbert and delivers the epic conclusion to Villeneuve’s trilogy. The film stars Timothée Chalamet, Zendaya, Jason Momoa, Florence Pugh, Rebecca Ferguson, Isaach De Bankolé, with Charlotte Rampling, with Anya Taylor-Joy, and Robert Pattinson, and Javier Bardem, and features newcomers Nakoa-Wolf Momoa and Ida Brooke.

snippet.title: YABI - TIMI HO
snippet.description:
Written & performed by YABI THE G.O.A.T
Recorded at Kadak Nepali Records
Mixing & Mastering by Ruthlex
 
Get connected

YABI : https://www.instagram.com/yabi_the_g.o.a.t?igsh=MzE0anFmemF0bXV6&utm_source=qr

kADAK NEPALI RECORDS: https://www.instagram.com/kadaknepali?igsh=cDVoNW82NmIxbWY1

Ruthlex: https://www.instagram.com/ruthlexx_np?igsh=OHJ3djdvM3NmcHpz


“Timi Ho”  the 4th track from my mixtape Boomerang is finally here. This song is about real connection, loyalty, and the one person who becomes your strength when everything else feels uncertain. Sometimes in life, no matter how far things go, the right energy always comes back to you like a boomerang.
Thank you to everyone who keeps supporting the journey and believing in the music. This one is from the heart.

“Timi Ho” is now streaming on all platforms.

snippet.title: Yabesh Thapa - Ghaamchhaya | Live From EDN Sanepa | GhaamChhaya Intimate
snippet.description:
Hi lovelies,
This is me and the band performing “Ghaamchhaya” live at GhaamChhaya Intimate. It’s the title track from the album “GhaamChhaya,” and it talks about how someone’s absence can truly hurt. Accepting it hurts even more. I really love this song, and I hope you do too.

Stream GhaamChhaya on all streaming platforms now

snippet.title: Lat Lag Gayee - 8K | Race 2 | Saif Ali Khan, Jacqueline | Benny Dayal, Shalmali | Pritam |Party Song
snippet.description:
Get Ready to Groove 🎶💃! Experience the Electric Chemistry of Saif Ali Khan and Jacqueline Fernandez in the Sizzling 'Lat Lag Gayee' Song from Race 2. 🔥🕺 Let the Rhythmic Beats Ignite the Dance Floor as they Set it on Fire! 🔥🔥

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

Song Credits :
Singers : Benny Dayal & Shalmali Kholgade
Music Director : Pritam
Lyrics : Mayur Puri
Mixed & Mastered By Eric Pillai
Grooves and synths : Hyacinth D Souza with Aman Nath
Accordion - Milos Milivojevic with Nikhil Paul George 
Additional programming and Sound Design 
Dj Phukan with Sunny & Pritam
 
Movie Cast & Crew :
Film Cast : Saif Ali Khan, Deepika Padukone, John Abraham, Jacqueline Fernandez, Anil Kapoor & Ameesha Patel.
Directed by :  Abbas-Mustan
Produced By : Ramesh S. Taurani

snippet.title: Timi Cheumai - NepRiff ( Official Lyric Video )
snippet.description:
Some feelings don’t need loud words…
Sometimes, just being cheumai is enough. 🤍
“Timi Cheumai” is a soft emotional song about silent love, unspoken understanding, and the comfort of someone’s presence. When words fail, the heart speaks through silence. This song captures that quiet warmth — where love flows without noise.
Close your eyes, feel the melody, and let the emotions breathe. 🌙✨

Available in Spotify 

https://open.spotify.com/track/0ql2CHqHLZ46v6u09PhP7U?si=dMDipIkmT2alsuVLRTmCtw

"I Like Me Better"

To be young and in love in New York City
To not know who I am but still know that I'm good long as you're here with me
To be drunk and in love in New York City
Midnight into morning coffee
Burning through the hours talking

Damn

I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time, I'd stay for a long time
'Cause I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

I don't know what it is but I got that feeling
Waking up in this bed next to you, swear the room yeah it got no ceiling
If we lay, let the day just pass us by
I might get to too much talking
I might have to tell you something

Damn

I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time, I'd stay for a long time
'Cause I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

Stay awhile stay awhile

Lay here with me
Yeah, yeah

'Cause I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

I like me, I like me

Better when

I like me better when I'm with you

snippet.title: Farkera Aauchhau Ki ( फर्केर आउँछौ कि ) || Ft. Gokarna Shrestha, Sumitra Tamang || Manish Limbu
snippet.description:
Farkera Aauchhau Ki ( फर्केर आउँछौ कि ) || Ft. Gokarna Shrestha, Sumitra Tamang || Manish Limbu

🎵 Audio Credit 🎵
Lyrics/Music : Gokarna Shrestha
Vocal : Manish Limbu
Arrange : Sagar Sansar Rai
Mixed/Mastered : Sajan Shah
Flute : Ratna BK
Guitar : Sanjeev Baraili
Sarangi : Manish Gandarva
Recording  : Mahol Studio

🎬 Video Credit 🎬
Cast :     Gokarna Shrestha
               Sumitra Tamang

Guest Cast : Zimbey Rai
                       Rajendra Khadgi
                       Anjana Barailli

Story/Concept : Gokarna Shrestha
Direction: Suman Basnet 
Camera: Sanam Tamang & Team
Edit/Color : Bikash Dahal
Makeup Artist : Aakriti Khadka
Production Manager : Surya oli
Technial Head : Harka Pahari & Team
                       

Special Thanks :
                             Biswa Limbu ( Mero Online TV )
                             Kehar Sing Limbu
                             Binod Tamang 
                             Sujan Bhurtel
                             Nirajan Thapa
                             Diraj Limbu
                             Ramesh Regmi
                             Arjun Katuwal
                             Arjun Khadka
                             Ramesh Shrestha
                             Prince Leo
                             Milan Khadka
                             Aditya Thakuri
                             Neyushan Shrestha
                             Shivraj Dangi
                             Saugat Gautam
                             Dinesh Kathyat
                             Krish Kc
                             Ramesh Rai
                             Samir M. Tamang

                            Standard Khabar Media PVT. LTD
                                   Dami Khabar PVT.LTD
                                   Biswa Limbu Podcast
                                   Brothers Rental
                                   Hotel Chisopani
                           All My Facebook & Tiktok family

Song Lyrisc :
टाढा गयौ तिमी, मलाई छोडेर
 खाएका बाचा अनि, विश्वासलाई तोडेर
बिन्ती गर्छु तिमीलाई, दुई हात जोडेर
 फर्की आइदेउ प्रिय, बाटो मोडेर 

टाढै भएपनि, मनको माया मर्दैन
 अन्तै खुसी छौ भने, फर्की आउनु पर्दैन। 

नफर्किनेगरी गयौ, मैले चाहेरनि रोक्न सकिन,
 आँसुले कोरेको शब्दमा, तिमी नै तिमी छौ किन?

फर्केर आउँछौ कि भन्ने, आश पनि मरेर गयो
मनदेखि माया गर्दा पनि, आज अधुरो भयो
 फर्केर आउँछौ कि भन्ने, आश पनि मरेर गयो
मनदेखि माया गर्दा पनि, आज अधुरो भयो…

तिम्रो तस्बिर हेर्दै, रातभरि बोल्छु।
 कल्पनामै भएपनि, मनको कुरा खोल्छु।
 सम्झन्छु ती दिनहरू,जब साथमा तिमी थियौ
 माया माग्दा बदलामा, किन धोका दियौ 

 थाहा छ तिमी अब, फर्केर आउँदैन
 मैले जति आँसु बगाएनि, तिमीलाई पाउँदैन। 

फर्केर आउँछौ कि भन्ने, आश पनि मरेर गयो
मनदेखि माया गर्दा पनि, आज अधुरो भयो
 फर्केर आउँछौ कि भन्ने, आश पनि मरेर गयो
मनदेखि माया गर्दा पनि, आज अधुरो भयो…

खुसी हुनु जोसँग छौ, तिम्रो बाटो छेक्दिन
टाढै जानु मदेखि ,अब तिमीलाई रोक्दिन
 बिर्सिएरै जाउ मलाई, सम्झनामा नआओस्
मैले पाएजस्तो धोका, तिमीले नपाओस् 

 अर्को जन्म हुन्छ भने, भेट्नु छैन तिमीलाई,
 बदला लिन आफ्नै मुटु, रेट्नु छैन तिमीलाई
फाटेको मन अब, यादको सियोले सिउँदछु।
यो जुनी त केवल, तिम्रै नाममा जिउँदछु। 

बाँच्नु छैन अब मलाई मुटु दुखाएर
गाह्रो भो हाँस्न अब आँसु लुकाएर

फर्केर आउँछौ कि भन्ने, आश पनि मरेर गयो
मनदेखि माया गर्दा पनि, आज अधुरो भयो
 फर्केर आउँछौ कि भन्ने, आश पनि मरेर गयो
मनदेखि माया गर्दा पनि, आज अधुरो भयो…

Tadha gayau timi, malai chhoder
Khayeka bacha ani, bishwaslai toder
Binti garchhu timilai, dui haat joder
Farki aideu priya, bato moder

Tadhai bhaepani, manko maya mardaina
Antai khusi chhau bhane, Farki aaunu pardaina

Nafarkine gari gayau, maile chahera ni rokna sakin
Aansule koreko shabdama, timi nai timi chhau kina?

Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo
Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo…

Timro tasbir herdai, raatbhari bolchhu
Kalpanamai bhaepani, manko kura kholchhu
Samjhinchhu ti dinharu, jaba saathma timi thiyau
Maya magda badlama, kina dhoka diyau

Thaha chha timi aba, Farkera aaudaina
Maile jati aansu bagaeni, timilai paaudaina

Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo
Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo…

Khusi hunu josanga chhau, timro bato chhekdina
Tadhai janu madekhi, aba timilai rokdina
Birsiera jau malai, samjhanama naaos
Maile paae jasto dhoka, timile napaos

Arko janma hunchha bhane, bhetna chhaina timilai
Badla lina aafnai mutu, retnu chhaina timilai
Fateko man aba, yaadko siyole siundchhu
Yo juni ta kebal, timrai naam ma jiundchhu

Bachnu chhaina aba malai mutu dukhaayera
Gahro bho haasna aba aansu lukaayera

Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo
Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo…

सोनाम राई

स्टुडियो
प्रिज्म

प्री–मिक्सिङ
कमल थापा मगर

रेकर्डिष्ट
गोविन्द अनेक

स्यामस्वईत रसाईली

अभिनय
सन्दिप मगर
जेसा तामाङ्ग
नरेश घले

नृत्य निर्देशन
मुकेश नेपाली

छायाङ्कन निर्देशन 
रामशरण उप्रेती

छायाङ्कन
सन्देश खड्का

फोकस अपरेटर
राजेन्द्र भण्डारी

सेट सहयोगी
शंकर बोहरा

प्रकाश व्यवस्थापन
नवराज खड्का
शिब पराजुली
गणेश रायमाझी

क्यामेरा/प्रकाश उपकरण
माता भगवती फिल्मस्

निर्माण व्यवस्थापक
कुल राज राई

भान्सा
अनिश कुवर

यातायात
शरण कुमार तामाङ्ग

नविना के.सी.

मदन राई

टिका देबी मगर (आमा)

विशेष धन्यवाद
पेमसाङ लामा
यमन खनाल

जनक क्षेत्री

भिडियो निर्माण
महक क्रिएसन प्रा. लि.

snippet.title: Ganga Ke Kinare | Bunny | Sagar | Kripa Record
snippet.description:
Kripa Record Presents "Ganga Ke Kinare"

Singer - Bunny & Sagar
Music & Compose - Bunny 
Lyrics - Sagar 
Flute - Kiran Vinkar
Mix & Master - Hanish Taneja

Featuring - Dimpy Negi
Director - Alex
Creative Director & DOP - Arshad
Editor - Zipsi
Colourist - Onkar
VFX - Ronak Bindra and Aman Singh bhakuni 
BTS - Shubham rana 
Camera Assitant - Golu
Sagar & Bunny Makeup & Hair - Viren 
Dimpy makeup & Hair - Sonakshi & Isha 
Choreographer - Chinu
Foreigners Coordinator - Chinu & Vijay Rawat
Dimpy Costume - Nandini Fashion ( Lehnga )
Camera & Light- Y-Series Production Lights 
Gaffer - Sunil 
Drone - Shanky 

Special thanks - Parmarth Niketan Ashram

Team Kripa Record - Ankita

Digital Distribution - Universal Music
Project Head - Sahil Sharma 

Lyrics: 

Chaand ko niharu
Shiv Jo pukaru x2
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke 
Baith ke…
Ganga ke kinaare 
baith ke 

Rooh ko sawaru 
Aarti utaaru
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke x2
Baith ke…. 

Hum toh hmare hi jeevan se hai itne 
Sataaye hue 
Toote hain bikhre hain hum toh 
Sabke bhulaye hue 

Kehte hain aaye jo 
Ganga nahaye 
Har jaate hain sab log 
Ab humne samjha hai 
Ab humne jana 
Kyu ganga aate hain log 

Thakk gaye the hum 
Dukhon ko utha ke 
Ab chain ayaaa 
Aayi ab saansain
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke 
Baith ke …. X2 

Kyu roye har baat me bandeya 
Kya laya tha sath me bandeya 
Jaane de jo chala gaya hai 
Kuch bi nai tere hath me bandeya  

Man nahi bharta 
Jitna bi taakain
Itna sukoon hain 
Bhar gayi aankhain
Ganga ke kinaare bath ke…
 
Ganga dharaye shivaye Ganga dharaye 
Har har bole namah shivaye..

Reach us at: Kriparecordsindia@gmail.com

(c) Universal Music Group

► About Kripa Record:

"Kripa Record" is a devotional music label dedicated to producing and promoting spiritual music that inspires profound experiences. "Kripa" meaning "grace" in Sanskrit, reflects the essence of divine mercy in the label's music. Kripa’s diverse devotional music is crafted by renowned artists, invoking peace, reverence, and spiritual awakening. It will serve as a cherished companion for meditation, prayer, and reflection.

snippet.title: Vaaste - 4K Video Song | Dhvani Bhanushali, Tanishk Bagchi | Bhushan K | RadhikaRao, Vinay S
snippet.description:
Vaaste - 4K Video Song | Dhvani Bhanushali, Tanishk Bagchi | Bhushan K | RadhikaRao, Vinay S
Vaaste Song: Dhvani Bhanushali, TanishkBagchi Nikhil D | Bhushan Kumar |RadhikaRao, Vinay Sapru

Song : Vaaste
Singers : Dhvani Bhanushali & Nikhil D’Souza
Music : Tanishk Bagchi 
Lyrics: Arafat Mehmood
Featuring: Siddharth Gupta and Anuj Saini
Music Label - T-Series 
Video By - Radhika Rao & Vinay Sapru
Songs Mixed & Mastered By Eric Pillai (Future Sound Of Bombay) 
Mix Assistant Engineers - Michael Edwin Pillai
Special Thanks to Azeem Dayani

Vaaste Lyrics
Vaaste Jaan Bhi Du
Main Gawah Emaan Bhi Du
Kismato Ka Likha Mod Du
Badle Mein Main Tere
Jo Khuda Khud Bhi De
Jannate Sach Kahu Chhod Du

Tumse Zaada Main Na Jaanu
Tumse Khud Ko Main Pehchanu
Tumko Bas Main Apna Maanu Mahiya

Vaaste Jaan Bhi Du
Main Gawah Emaan Bhi Du
Kismato Ka Likha Mod Du

Tere Alava Koi Bhi Khawish
Nahi Hai Baaki Dil Mein
Kadam Uthau Jaha Bhi Jaau
Tujhi Se Jaau Millne

Tere Liye Mera Safar
Tere Bina Main Jaau Kidhar

In this video Karl challenges Minecraft’s deadliest players: ClownPierce, Purpled, and FlameFrags to take on 1,000 REAL players. snippet.title: Dil Aaya - Aviverse | ‪‪ @astheticavi  |‪‪ @MeAbhishekShukla   (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
STREAM All Songs Of  Aviverse : https://open.spotify.com/artist/0HTZXytA3dhUpgTADrDn9O?si=CMRqfcHkRy-qTAWA4WGEqw

"Dil Aaya" is a romantic song about the powerful feeling of falling in love just by looking into someone’s beautiful eyes. Sometimes a single glance is enough to steal a heart, and this song captures that exact emotion.

The song expresses the attraction, the charm of kajal-filled eyes, and the moment when someone becomes so special that the heart begins to dream of a future together. It is about love, admiration, and the promise of holding hands and walking through life together.

Audio Credits:

Song Name : Dil Aaya
Vocals : Avinash Kumar & Abhishek Shukla
Lyrics : Abhishek Shukla & Avinash Kumar
Composed by : Avinash Kumar & Abhishek Shukla
Music Producer : Abs

Video Credits:
 
Cast:  Tanvi Duggal , Janhavi Joshi , Abhishek Shukla & Avinash Kumar
Director: Joseph B. 
Producer: Avinash Kumar
Cinematographer : Vasu Menon 
Assistant Cinematographer : Archit
Line Producer: Shravan
Editor: Ajmal Rasali
Colorist: Ajmal Rasali
Poster & Thumbnail Designer: Junaid & Shreyas


Stream On Aviverse Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/artist/0HTZXytA3dhUpgTADrDn9O?si=CMRqfcHkRy-qTAWA4WGEqw

Aviverse's Instagram -      / aviversemusic    
Abhishek's Instagram -       / abhishekxavi    
Avinash's Instagram -         / aesthetic_avii    

Lyrics  :

"Dil Aaya" is a romantic song about the powerful feeling of falling in love just by looking into someone’s beautiful eyes. Sometimes a single glance is enough to steal a heart, and this song captures that exact emotion.

The song expresses the attraction, the charm of kajal-filled eyes, and the moment when someone becomes so special that the heart begins to dream of a future together. It is about love, admiration, and the promise of holding hands and walking through life together.

Lyrics ~ Banjaare - Bairan
Manne saambh-saambh raakhe
Tere jhanjhraa ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi
Chhori bawle se hore

Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere
Khaaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen konya deti
Haaye...
Bairi tanhaai manne

Geeta mein gaai kade
Chaati ke lagaai manne
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai manne

Saambh-saambh raakhi bahut
Chaati ke lagaai manne
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai manne

Ho...
Maarya-maarya phire
Dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi
Ke jeena banjaare ka

Khoya rahun yaad teri
Kar ke nadaaniyaan
Batuwe mein rakhun teri
Saambh ke nishaaniyaan

Tere bina kaal horeya
Theek konya haal mera
Haath jodun Ram dede
Saansa te rihaai manne

Geeta mein gaai kade
Chaati ke lagaai manne
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai manne

Saambh-saambh raakhi bahut
Chaati ke lagaai re
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai re

Je tu thodi ghabra jya
Meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re main
Aa jaaunga

Todun duniya ki reet
Re ke haar re ke jeet
Manne chahiye teri preet
Main nibha jaaunga

Dekh bawla bana gi
Manne likhna sikha gi
Haaye... noch-noch khaagi
Teri bairan judaai manne

Geeta mein gaai kade
Chaati ke lagaai manne
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai manne

Saambh-saambh raakhi bahut
Chaati ke lagaai re
Jit bhi gaya re

snippet.title: Lana Del Rey - Young And Beautiful (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
╰┈➤ Dive into the lyrics of “Young And Beautiful” — a space where every word feels like it was written just for you.
Here, music is more than sound — it’s memories, emotions, and little moments that stay with us.

Lana Del Rey - Young And Beautiful (Lyrics) ▶︎ •၊၊||၊|။||||။၊|• 3:57
#LanaDelRey #pop #alternative
 
╰┈➤ On this channel, you’ll find songs that feel straight out of an indie film: timeless classics and hidden gems waiting to become your new favorites.

If this song kept you company today:
💌 Share it with someone who needs it
⭐ Subscribe and keep this little corner saved for whenever you want to come back
🫰 Leave a comment telling us which song moves your heart

⤷ ゛follow Lana Del Reyˎˊ˗
Tiktok: https://www.tiktok.com/@lanadelrey
Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/@LanaDelRey
｡･:*˚:✧｡ ｡･:*˚:✧｡ ｡･:*˚:✧｡｡･:*˚:✧｡｡･:*˚:✧｡

Lyrics:
I've seen the world, done it all, had my cake now
Diamonds, brilliant, and Bel Air now
Hot summer nights, mid-July
When you and I were forever wild
The crazy days, city lights
The way you'd play with me like a child
Will you still love me when I'm no longer young and beautiful?
Will you still love me when I got nothing but my aching soul?
I know you will, I know you will, I know that you will
Will you still love me when I'm no longer beautiful?
I've seen the world, lit it up as my stage now
Channeling angels in the new age now
Hot summer days, rock and roll
The way you'd play for me at your show
And all the ways I got to know
Your pretty face, and electric soul
Will you still love me when I'm no longer young and beautiful?
Will you still love me when I got nothing but my aching soul?
I know you will, I know you will, I know that you will
Will you still love me when I'm no longer beautiful?
Dear Lord, when I get to Heaven
Please, let me bring my man
When he comes, tell me that you'll let him in
Father, tell me if you can
All that grace, all that body
All that face makes me wanna party
He's my sun, he makes me shine like diamonds
Will you still love me, when I'm no longer young and beautiful?
Will you still love me, when I got nothing but my aching soul?
I know you will, I know you will, I know that you will
Will you still love me when I'm no longer beautiful?
Will you still love me, when I'm no longer beautiful?
Will you still love me, when I'm not young and beautiful?
｡･:*˚:✧｡ ｡･:*˚:✧｡ ｡･:*˚:✧｡｡･:*˚:✧｡｡･:*˚:✧｡

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

מה זה רובלוקס? רובלוקס הוא מגרש משחקים וירטואלי מקוון וסדנה, שבו ילדים בכל הגילאים יכולים לתקשר, ליצור, ליהנות וללמוד בבטחה. זה ייחודי בכך שכמעט כל דבר ב-ROBLOX מתוכנן ונבנה על ידי חברי הקהילה. ROBLOX מיועד לגילאי 13 עד 18, אך פתוח לאנשים בכל הגילאים. כל שחקן מתחיל בבחירת אווטאר ומתן זהות לו. לאחר מכן הם יכולים לחקור את ROBLOX - לתקשר עם אחרים על ידי צ'אט, משחקי משחקים או שיתוף פעולה בפרויקטים יצירתיים. כל שחקן מקבל גם פיסת קרקע לא מפותחת משלו יחד עם ארגז כלים וירטואלי שבעזרתו ניתן לעצב ולבנות כל דבר - בין אם זה גורד שחקים ניווט, מסוק פעיל, מכונת פינבול ענקית, משחק מרובה משתתפים "לכידת הדגל" או יצירה אחרת שטרם הומצאה. אין עלות עבור חלקת אדמה וירטואלית ראשונה זו. על ידי השתתפות ובניית דברים מגניבים, חברי ROBLOX יכולים להרוויח תגים מיוחדים וכן דולרים של ROBLOX ("Robux"). בתורם, הם יכולים לקנות בקטלוג המקוון בגדים ואביזרים לאווטארים, כמו גם חומרי בנייה איכותיים, רכיבים אינטראקטיביים ומנגנונים פועלים.

Твіттер: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

Що таке Roblox? ROBLOX — це віртуальний онлайн-майстерня та майстерня, де діти різного віку можуть безпечно взаємодіяти, творити, розважатися та навчатися. Він унікальний тим, що практично все в ROBLOX розроблено та побудовано членами спільноти. ROBLOX розроблений для дітей віком від 13 до 18 років, але відкритий для людей будь-якого віку. Кожен гравець починає з вибору аватара та надання йому ідентичності. Потім вони можуть досліджувати ROBLOX — взаємодіяти з іншими через чат, ігри або співпрацювати над творчими проектами. Кожному гравцеві також надається власний шматок незабудованої нерухомості разом із віртуальним набором інструментів, за допомогою якого можна проектувати та будувати що завгодно — будь то хмарочос, яким можна керувати, робочий гелікоптер, гігантський пінбольний автомат, багатокористувацька гра «Захоплення прапора» чи якесь інше, ще не вигадане творіння. Ця перша ділянка віртуальної землі безкоштовна. Беручи участь та будуючи круті речі, учасники ROBLOX можуть заробляти спеціальні значки, а також долари ROBLOX («Robux»). У свою чергу, вони можуть купувати одяг та аксесуари для аватарів в онлайн-каталозі, а також преміальні будівельні матеріали, інтерактивні компоненти та робочі механізми.

O que é Roblox? ROBLOX é um playground e oficina virtual online, onde crianças de todas as idades podem interagir, criar, se divertir e aprender com segurança. O que torna o ROBLOX único é o fato de praticamente tudo nele ser projetado e construído por membros da comunidade. O ROBLOX é voltado para jovens de 13 a 18 anos, mas é aberto a pessoas de todas as idades. Cada jogador começa escolhendo um avatar e dando a ele uma identidade. Em seguida, pode explorar o ROBLOX — interagindo com outros jogadores por meio de bate-papo, jogos ou colaborando em projetos criativos. Cada jogador também recebe seu próprio terreno virtual não desenvolvido, juntamente com uma caixa de ferramentas virtual para projetar e construir qualquer coisa — seja um arranha-céu navegável, um helicóptero funcional, uma máquina de pinball gigante, um jogo multiplayer de "Capture a Bandeira" ou alguma outra criação ainda não imaginada. Não há custo para este primeiro terreno virtual. Ao participar e construir coisas legais, os membros do ROBLOX podem ganhar distintivos especiais, bem como dólares ROBLOX ("Robux"). Por sua vez, eles podem usar os Robux para comprar roupas e acessórios para seus avatares no catálogo online, além de materiais de construção premium, componentes interativos e mecanismos funcionais.

Was ist Roblox? Roblox ist ein virtueller Online-Spielplatz und eine Werkstatt, in der Kinder jeden Alters sicher interagieren, kreativ sein, Spaß haben und lernen können. Das Besondere an ROBLOX ist, dass praktisch alles von Mitgliedern der Community entworfen und gebaut wird. ROBLOX ist zwar für 13- bis 18-Jährige gedacht, steht aber allen Altersgruppen offen. Jeder Spieler beginnt mit der Auswahl eines Avatars und gibt ihm eine Identität. Anschließend können sie ROBLOX erkunden und mit anderen chatten, Spiele spielen oder gemeinsam an kreativen Projekten arbeiten. Jeder Spieler erhält außerdem ein eigenes, unbebautes Grundstück sowie eine virtuelle Werkzeugkiste, mit der er alles Mögliche entwerfen und bauen kann – sei es ein begehbarer Wolkenkratzer, ein funktionierender Hubschrauber, ein riesiger Flipperautomat, ein Multiplayer-„Capture the Flag“-Spiel oder eine andere, noch nie dagewesene Kreation. Das erste virtuelle Grundstück ist kostenlos. Durch die Teilnahme und das Erstellen cooler Inhalte können ROBLOX-Mitglieder spezielle Abzeichen und ROBLOX-Dollar („Robux“) verdienen. Damit können sie im Online-Katalog Avatar-Kleidung und -Accessoires sowie Premium-Baumaterialien, interaktive Komponenten und funktionierende Mechanismen kaufen.

Wat is Roblox? ROBLOX is een online virtuele speelplaats en werkplaats waar kinderen van alle leeftijden veilig kunnen spelen, creëren, plezier hebben en leren. রোব্লক্স কী? রোব্লক্স হলো একটি অনলাইন ভার্চুয়াল খেলার মাঠ এবং কর্মশালা, যেখানে সব বয়সের শিশুরা নিরাপদে একে অপরের সাথে যোগাযোগ করতে, কিছু তৈরি করতে, মজা করতে এবং শিখতে পারে। এর বিশেষত্ব হলো, ROBLOX-এর প্রায় সবকিছুই কমিউনিটির সদস্যদের দ্বারা ডিজাইন ও নির্মাণ করা হয়। ROBLOX মূলত ১৩ থেকে ১৮ বছর বয়সীদের জন্য তৈরি, কিন্তু এটি সব বয়সের মানুষের জন্য উন্মুক্ত। প্রত্যেক খেলোয়াড় একটি অ্যাভাটার বেছে নিয়ে এবং সেটিকে একটি পরিচয় দিয়ে খেলা শুরু করে। এরপর তারা ROBLOX-এ ঘুরে বেড়াতে পারে — চ্যাট করে, গেম খেলে বা সৃজনশীল প্রকল্পে সহযোগিতা করে অন্যদের সাথে যোগাযোগ স্থাপন করতে পারে। প্রত্যেক খেলোয়াড়কে তাদের নিজস্ব এক টুকরো অনুন্নত জমি এবং একটি ভার্চুয়াল টুলবক্সও দেওয়া হয়, যা দিয়ে তারা যেকোনো কিছু ডিজাইন ও নির্মাণ করতে পারে — তা হতে পারে চলাচলযোগ্য একটি আকাশচুম্বী ভবন, একটি সচল হেলিকপ্টার, একটি বিশাল পিনবল মেশিন, একটি মাল্টিপ্লেয়ার “ক্যাপচার দ্য ফ্ল্যাগ” গেম বা অন্য কোনো অকল্পনীয় সৃষ্টি। এই প্রথম ভার্চুয়াল জমির প্লটটির জন্য কোনো খরচ নেই। অংশগ্রহণ করে এবং চমৎকার জিনিস তৈরি করে, ROBLOX-এর সদস্যরা বিশেষ ব্যাজ এবং ROBLOX ডলার (“Robux”) অর্জন করতে পারে। এর মাধ্যমে, তারা অনলাইন ক্যাটালগ থেকে অ্যাভাটারের পোশাক ও আনুষঙ্গিক জিনিসপত্র, সেইসাথে প্রিমিয়াম নির্মাণ সামগ্রী, ইন্টারেক্টিভ উপাদান এবং সচল যন্ত্রাংশ কিনতে পারে।

എന്താണ് Roblox? എല്ലാ പ്രായത്തിലുമുള്ള കുട്ടികൾക്ക് സുരക്ഷിതമായി ഇടപഴകാനും സൃഷ്ടിക്കാനും ആസ്വദിക്കാനും പഠിക്കാനും കഴിയുന്ന ഒരു ഓൺലൈൻ വെർച്വൽ കളിസ്ഥലവും വർക്ക്‌ഷോപ്പുമാണ് ROBLOX. ROBLOX-ലെ പ്രായോഗികമായി എല്ലാം കമ്മ്യൂണിറ്റിയിലെ അംഗങ്ങൾ രൂപകൽപ്പന ചെയ്ത് നിർമ്മിച്ചതാണ് എന്നതാണ് ഇതിന്റെ പ്രത്യേകത. ROBLOX 13 മുതൽ 18 വയസ്സ് വരെ പ്രായമുള്ളവർക്കായി രൂപകൽപ്പന ചെയ്‌തിട്ടുണ്ടെങ്കിലും എല്ലാ പ്രായത്തിലുമുള്ള ആളുകൾക്കും ഇത് തുറന്നിരിക്കുന്നു. ഓരോ കളിക്കാരനും ഒരു അവതാർ തിരഞ്ഞെടുത്ത് അതിന് ഒരു ഐഡന്റിറ്റി നൽകുന്നതിലൂടെയാണ് ആരംഭിക്കുന്നത്. തുടർന്ന് അവർക്ക് ROBLOX പര്യവേക്ഷണം ചെയ്യാൻ കഴിയും - ചാറ്റ് ചെയ്തുകൊണ്ടോ, ഗെയിമുകൾ കളിച്ചോ, അല്ലെങ്കിൽ സൃഷ്ടിപരമായ പ്രോജക്റ്റുകളിൽ സഹകരിച്ചോ മറ്റുള്ളവരുമായി ഇടപഴകുന്നു. ഓരോ കളിക്കാരനും അവരുടേതായ വികസിപ്പിക്കാത്ത റിയൽ എസ്റ്റേറ്റ് കഷണവും, എന്തും രൂപകൽപ്പന ചെയ്യാനും നിർമ്മിക്കാനും കഴിയുന്ന ഒരു വെർച്വൽ ടൂൾബോക്സും നൽകുന്നു - അത് ഒരു നാവിഗേറ്റ് ചെയ്യാവുന്ന അംബരചുംബി, പ്രവർത്തിക്കുന്ന ഹെലികോപ്റ്റർ, ഒരു ഭീമൻ പിൻബോൾ മെഷീൻ, ഒരു മൾട്ടിപ്ലെയർ "ക്യാപ്ചർ ദി ഫ്ലാഗ്" ഗെയിം അല്ലെങ്കിൽ മറ്റേതെങ്കിലും, ഇതുവരെ സ്വപ്നം കാണാത്ത സൃഷ്ടി. വെർച്വൽ ഭൂമിയുടെ ഈ ആദ്യ പ്ലോട്ടിന് യാതൊരു ചെലവുമില്ല. പങ്കെടുക്കുന്നതിലൂടെയും രസകരമായ കാര്യങ്ങൾ നിർമ്മിക്കുന്നതിലൂടെയും, ROBLOX അംഗങ്ങൾക്ക് സ്പെഷ്യാലിറ്റി ബാഡ്ജുകളും ROBLOX ഡോളറുകളും ("Robux") നേടാൻ കഴിയും. അതാകട്ടെ, അവതാർ വസ്ത്രങ്ങളും അനുബന്ധ ഉപകരണങ്ങളും വാങ്ങുന്നതിന് ഓൺലൈൻ കാറ്റലോഗിൽ നിന്ന് വാങ്ങാനും പ്രീമിയം നിർമ്മാണ സാമഗ്രികൾ, സംവേദനാത്മക ഘടകങ്ങൾ, പ്രവർത്തന സംവിധാനങ്ങൾ എന്നിവ വാങ്ങാനും കഴിയും.

#Roblox #foltyn

रोब्लॉक्स क्या है? रोब्लॉक्स एक ऑनलाइन वर्चुअल खेल का मैदान और वर्कशॉप है, जहां सभी उम्र के बच्चे सुरक्षित रूप से एक-दूसरे से बातचीत कर सकते हैं, कुछ नया बना सकते हैं, मज़े कर सकते हैं और सीख सकते हैं। ROBLOX की खासियत यह है कि इस पर लगभग सब कुछ समुदाय के सदस्यों द्वारा ही डिज़ाइन और निर्मित किया जाता है। ROBLOX 13 से 18 वर्ष की आयु के लोगों के लिए डिज़ाइन किया गया है, लेकिन यह सभी उम्र के लोगों के लिए खुला है। प्रत्येक खिलाड़ी एक अवतार चुनकर और उसे एक पहचान देकर शुरुआत करता है। फिर वे ROBLOX को एक्सप्लोर कर सकते हैं - दूसरों के साथ चैट करके, गेम खेलकर या रचनात्मक परियोजनाओं पर सहयोग करके बातचीत कर सकते हैं। प्रत्येक खिलाड़ी को एक अविकसित वर्चुअल ज़मीन का टुकड़ा और एक वर्चुअल टूलबॉक्स भी दिया जाता है, जिससे वे कुछ भी डिज़ाइन और निर्माण कर सकते हैं - चाहे वह चलने-फिरने योग्य गगनचुंबी इमारत हो, एक चलता-फिरता हेलीकॉप्टर हो, एक विशाल पिनबॉल मशीन हो, एक मल्टीप्लेयर "कैप्चर द फ्लैग" गेम हो या कोई अन्य, अभी तक कल्पना भी न की गई रचना। इस पहले वर्चुअल ज़मीन के टुकड़े के लिए कोई कीमत नहीं है। भाग लेकर और शानदार चीज़ें बनाकर, ROBLOX सदस्य विशेष बैज और ROBLOX डॉलर ("रोबक्स") कमा सकते हैं। बदले में, वे ऑनलाइन कैटलॉग से अवतार के कपड़े और एक्सेसरीज़ के साथ-साथ प्रीमियम निर्माण सामग्री, इंटरैक्टिव कंपोनेंट और काम करने वाले मैकेनिज़्म खरीद सकते हैं।


#रोब्लॉक्स #फोल्टिन

fr-FR.title: ROBLOX SLAP BRAINROTS..
fr-FR.description:
Aujourd'hui, j'ai mis une raclée à des crétins ! Regardez la vidéo en entier pour découvrir la suite.

Boutique : https://foltyn.shop/

Rejoignez cette chaîne pour accéder à des avantages :

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Réseaux sociaux--

Discord : https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Groupe Roblox : https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Nom Roblox : TheRealFoltyn

Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter : https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

Qu'est-ce que Roblox ? Roblox est un univers virtuel en ligne où les enfants de tous âges peuvent interagir, créer, s'amuser et apprendre en toute sécurité. ROBLOX est unique en son genre : presque tout y est conçu et construit par les membres de la communauté. Conçu pour les 13-18 ans, ROBLOX est cependant ouvert à tous. Chaque joueur commence par choisir un avatar et lui donner une identité. Il peut ensuite explorer ROBLOX et interagir avec les autres en discutant, en jouant ou en collaborant sur des projets créatifs. Chaque joueur reçoit également son propre terrain virtuel non aménagé, ainsi qu'une boîte à outils virtuelle pour concevoir et construire tout ce qu'il souhaite : un gratte-ciel navigable, un hélicoptère fonctionnel, un flipper géant, un jeu multijoueur de « Capture du drapeau » ou toute autre création encore inimaginée. Ce premier terrain virtuel est gratuit. En participant et en créant des choses originales, les membres de ROBLOX peuvent gagner des badges spéciaux et des ROBLOX dollars (« Robux »). Ils peuvent ensuite utiliser ces Robux pour acheter des vêtements et des accessoires pour leur avatar, ainsi que des matériaux de construction premium, des composants interactifs et des mécanismes fonctionnels.

#Roblox #foltyn

Grupa Roblox: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Nazwa w Roblox: TheRealFoltyn

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

Czym jest Roblox? ROBLOX to wirtualny plac zabaw i warsztat online, gdzie dzieci w każdym wieku mogą bezpiecznie wchodzić w interakcje, tworzyć, bawić się i uczyć. Wyjątkowość ROBLOX polega na tym, że praktycznie wszystko w grze jest projektowane i tworzone przez członków społeczności. ROBLOX jest przeznaczony dla osób w wieku od 13 do 18 lat, ale jest otwarty dla osób w każdym wieku. Każdy gracz zaczyna od wyboru awatara i nadania mu tożsamości. Następnie może odkrywać ROBLOX — wchodząc w interakcje z innymi poprzez czatowanie, granie w gry lub współpracę przy kreatywnych projektach. Każdy gracz otrzymuje również własny, niezagospodarowany kawałek ziemi wraz z wirtualnym zestawem narzędzi, za pomocą którego może zaprojektować i zbudować cokolwiek zechce — czy to nawigacyjny wieżowiec, działający helikopter, gigantyczny flipper, grę wieloosobową „Zdobądź Flagę” czy inne, jeszcze niewyobrażalne dzieło. Ta pierwsza wirtualna działka jest darmowa. Uczestnicząc w projekcie i budując fajne rzeczy, członkowie ROBLOX mogą zdobywać specjalne odznaki, a także dolary ROBLOX („Robuxy”). Mogą oni również przeglądać katalog online, aby kupić ubrania i akcesoria dla awatarów, a także wysokiej jakości materiały budowlane, interaktywne komponenty i działające mechanizmy.

#Roblox #foltyn

Nome Roblox: TheRealFoltyn

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

Cos'è Roblox? ROBLOX è un parco giochi e laboratorio virtuale online, dove i ragazzi di tutte le età possono interagire, creare, divertirsi e imparare in tutta sicurezza. La sua particolarità è che praticamente tutto su ROBLOX è progettato e costruito dai membri della community. ROBLOX è pensato per ragazzi dai 13 ai 18 anni, ma è aperto a persone di tutte le età. Ogni giocatore inizia scegliendo un avatar e dandogli un'identità. Può quindi esplorare ROBLOX, interagendo con gli altri tramite chat, giocando o collaborando a progetti creativi. Ogni giocatore riceve anche un proprio appezzamento di terreno virtuale non edificato, insieme a una cassetta degli attrezzi virtuale con cui progettare e costruire qualsiasi cosa: un grattacielo navigabile, un elicottero funzionante, un flipper gigante, un gioco multiplayer "Cattura la bandiera" o qualsiasi altra creazione ancora da immaginare. Questo primo appezzamento di terreno virtuale è gratuito. Partecipando e costruendo cose interessanti, i membri di ROBLOX possono guadagnare badge speciali e dollari ROBLOX ("Robux"). A loro volta, possono utilizzare questi Robux per acquistare abbigliamento e accessori per il proprio avatar, nonché materiali da costruzione di alta qualità, componenti interattivi e meccanismi funzionanti dal catalogo online.

#Roblox #foltyn

Grup Roblox: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Nama Roblox: TheRealFoltyn

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

Apa itu Roblox? ROBLOX adalah taman bermain dan bengkel virtual online, tempat anak-anak dari segala usia dapat berinteraksi, berkreasi, bersenang-senang, dan belajar dengan aman. ROBLOX unik karena hampir semua hal di dalamnya dirancang dan dibangun oleh anggota komunitas. ROBLOX dirancang untuk usia 13 hingga 18 tahun, tetapi terbuka untuk semua usia. Setiap pemain memulai dengan memilih avatar dan memberinya identitas. Mereka kemudian dapat menjelajahi ROBLOX — berinteraksi dengan orang lain melalui obrolan, bermain game, atau berkolaborasi dalam proyek kreatif. Setiap pemain juga diberikan sebidang lahan virtual yang belum dikembangkan beserta kotak peralatan virtual untuk mendesain dan membangun apa pun — baik itu gedung pencakar langit yang dapat dijelajahi, helikopter yang berfungsi, mesin pinball raksasa, game "Capture the Flag" multipemain, atau kreasi lain yang belum terbayangkan. Tidak ada biaya untuk lahan virtual pertama ini. Dengan berpartisipasi dan membangun hal-hal keren, anggota ROBLOX dapat memperoleh lencana khusus serta mata uang ROBLOX ("Robux"). Sebagai gantinya, mereka dapat berbelanja di katalog online untuk membeli pakaian dan aksesori avatar serta bahan bangunan premium, komponen interaktif, dan mekanisme yang berfungsi.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: TIMRO LOOKS - Rinmorin ft. KBABI (Official Music Video) Prod. itsriken
snippet.description:
TIMRO LOOKS - Rinmorin ft. KBABI (Official Music Video) Prod. Itsriken 
⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯
“TIMRO LOOKS” is a rap song with a flirty mood, talking about that one girl whose looks and vibe keep running through my mind♪

Official Audio - https://youtu.be/hMIDW5HUY08?si=OMalmwP6kpg-L5n5

lyrics...

HOOK *
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER
MERO HOOK TIMI SAMPLE 
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER 
ATOM BOOM VANDA DANGER 
                     X2

Rinmorin - Verse 
HEJO SAAMA MALAI BAAL THYNA 
KASAI KO YHA JABA TIMLAI DEKHY MERO 
MUKH BATA DAMM GRIL 

LUKI LUKI HERNY BANI LAGYO TIMI LAI 
MA NAJIKINA KHOJE TARA KADA UMRYO JHYAN VAARRR

HALKA GARIDAUNA BATH 
ABO CHAIYO TIMRO SAATH DIYE 
CHODINA YO HAAT JHUTO  BOLE 
VANY MARI JAAUU

MUTU VETRA JAMMA 4 WOTA THAU 
HUNXA 
2 THAUMA TIMI RA MAH  2 THAUMA 
AAMA BAAU

RAKHI SAKE TIMLAI AARU VANDA MATHI 
AAKHA LAUNY TORI HARKO HAAT KHUTAA
VAACHDINXU MAAA

AARU VANDA NIKAI FARK XU MAH BAAL SANGAI  BUDHI ANI BAAG JASTI AATI XU MAAH 
TIMI 
XAUMA HUDA KAILY AATIN XA MAANN
JHUTO BOLYA HOINA  NASALU CHJJJ KHADINA MA
JALMA
 PARISAKE KEBAL HAAT DINUU LAAAA
ABO BAKI KURA PANDIT LAI RAKHDINXU MA TIMRO 

 LACHKINY KAAMR KO 36 KO number 
NA LAJAUNA VANNA LAI BADDHAI CHA 
HUNGER MA JAPDAI  XU MANTAR YHA DHERI XA ANTAR 
TIMRO JAWANI DEKHE RA LAAGDAI CHA 
CHAKKR

MA MAYA KO ROGI 
TIMI BANDAUNA 
DOCTOR AHH
 MAYA KO LAGI KATI 
KHADAI CHU THAKKR

HALKA BADY KO JEEUDAL 
MAH  MAKHHA TIMI SIMPLE NAI 
RAMRI NA PARANA NAKAL 

HOOK *
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER
MERO HOOK TIMI SAMPLE 
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER 
ATOM BOOM VANDA DANGER
                  X2

KBABI - verse 
NAHANA KTA GUFF MATHI GUFF 
DHERAI AATE GAYE TIMI JASTO CHAKS
RAYAAK LAGI RACHA PACHI PACHI
NAPARANA HASSss…..

Rinmorin - YOU KNOW WHAT I MEAN !!!

FASDINA MAH JHAL MAH
NAGARANA AASH 
JAY HO TYI VANDINXU MALAI LAGDAINA K LAAJ
MALAI MAAN PARDAINA BOKA HARU 
VANU PARDA KHASS
SAMALYRA RAKHA TIMRO JAWANI KO MAAT

K VAKO KTA HARU KT DEKHI MARNY
JHYAP CHA SIDE MAH CHICKS KO PAXI PARNY KT DEKHNAI HUNNA 
MASKY RA KURA GARNY 
K BOLIDI HALYO VANY FERI
MASKI NAJIK SARNY 

GARO GARO VAKO HOLA 
JAWANI DEKHYRA
CHITTA BUJAU ABO KTA 
TADHAI BATA HERYRA
TIMI JASTO GAFADI YHA KTA HARU
DHERAI CHA THMANAI NASAKNY TESTO KURA MA MAH K RAICHA 

Rinmorin - OH shit !!

KBABI - MAYA KO ROGI VAYE JAAU GARAU CHECK UP 
TIMRO POCKET MONEY LAY AAUDAINA MERO MAKE-UP
SOCHDAI SOCHDINA MA MERO MIND PURAI SETUP 
KBABI TESTO KTA GARDAINA NI DESERVE 

PATAUNA KHOJYA HOLA
PATINY MAH CHAINA
GUFADI KO TRUST UMMM HMM
TESTO KT HOINA
KTA HARKO BANI SABI YESTI TA HO NI 
AAFNO KAAM GARA PACHI NALAGANA
SORRY BRO….

HOOK *
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER
MERO HOOK TIMI SAMPLE 
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER 
ATOM BOOM VANDA DANGER  
                  X2

snippet.title: Lauv - I Like Me Better
snippet.description:
Lauv - I Like Me Better

(Lyrics)
[Verse 1]
To be young and in love in New York City
To not know who I am but still know that I'm good long as you're here with me
To be drunk and in love in New York City
Midnight into morning coffee
Burnin' through the hours talkin' (Damn)

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time
I'd stay for a long time 'cause
I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

[Drop]

[Verse 2]
I don't know what it is, but I got that feelin'
Wakin' up in this bed next to you, swear the room, yeah, it got no ceilin'
If we lay, let the day just pass us by
I might get to too much talkin'
I might have to tell you somethin' (Damn)

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time
I'd stay for a long time 'cause
I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

[Drop]

[Bridge]
Stay awhile, stay awhile, stay here with me
Stay awhile, stay awhile, oh
Stay awhile, stay awhile, stay here with me
Lay here with me, ayy, ayy, ooh

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you (Yes, I do, yes, I do, baby)
I like me better when I'm with you (Oh no)
I knew from the first time
I'd stay for a long time 'cause
I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

[Outro]
(I like me, I like me)
(Look who you made me, made me, oh no)
Better when
I like me better when I'm with you

Tags:

I Like Me Better Lauv
Stay awhile stay awhile stay here with me
Lay here with me ayy ayy ooh
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better
When I'm with you
I knew from the first time
I'd stay for a long time 'cause
I like me better when
I like me better when I am with you
I Like Me Better

snippet.title: Countries Decide Who Wins $25,000
snippet.description:
I can’t believe who they chose

This might be the coolest thing we've ever made! Go check out the new Feastables x Super Mario Galaxy Movie products at Kroger, 7Eleven, Five Below, and Walmart locations nationwide 🚀 https://feastables.com/pages/find-a-store

We invited a bunch of countries and nations across the world to decide who should win $25,000 based off those that typically compete in the Olympics. However, we did accidentally label SpeedSilver as United Kingdom when we meant to have him as England, sorry SpeedSilver!

We did our best recreating the world map in Minecraft as close as possible to real life, but due to size restrictions in game so it didn't take an hour to cross the map it may not be entirely 1:1 so there may be some unintentional inconsistencies in the terrain and generation of the in game world map

New Merch - https://mrbeast.store
Join our discord server for your chance to compete in future Minecraft challenges!
https://discord.gg/mrbeastgaming

Music Provided by https://www.extrememusic.com
----------------------------------------------------------------
follow all of these or i will kick you
• Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/MrBeast/
• Twitter - https://twitter.com/MrBeast
•  Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/mrbeast
--------------------------------------------------------------------

en.title: Countries Decide Who Wins $25,000
en.description:
I can’t believe who they chose

This might be the coolest thing we've ever made! Go check out the new Feastables x Super Mario Galaxy Movie products at Kroger, 7Eleven, Five Below, and Walmart locations nationwide 🚀 https://feastables.com/pages/find-a-store

We invited a bunch of countries and nations across the world to decide who should win $25,000 based off those that typically compete in the Olympics. However, we did accidentally label SpeedSilver as United Kingdom when we meant to have him as England, sorry SpeedSilver!

We did our best recreating the world map in Minecraft as close as possible to real life, but due to size restrictions in game so it didn't take an hour to cross the map it may not be entirely 1:1 so there may be some unintentional inconsistencies in the terrain and generation of the in game world map

New Merch - https://mrbeast.store
Join our discord server for your chance to compete in future Minecraft challenges!

LYRICS📝
मेरा आँखा काली काली, मेरा आँखामा गजली, मेरा सैयाँ वन्डरफुल, मुई त सैयाँकी दिलवाली x 2 
सैयाँलाई सब कुरबान, मेरा सैयाँ परान, सैयाँ स्वीटहार्ट, जान सैयाँ भौत निका र्यान...

अ!  तु पन छाड कम काँ छै, रेखा थापा झै लागिरैछै
 बारुलि कम्मर भाच्चि धै, सुदुरकी छोर्याट्टि जोरकी छै
 कि ल्याईदिउ तुखि साडि कि लेहेङ्गा, निधारमी लाईदिउ कि चम्किने बिन्दा, 
 हिरुनि बनौलो तुलाई,फिलम सुपरहिट होलो फिलम तु जन गरे चिन्ता, 
सोधिहाल घर मम्मिखि छरबट्ट होलो नति गालिकि 
आउनि ब!  झाने है त Longdrive मा गाडिमा घुमौछ तेरो सैया जी...

ओ सैयाँ, ओ सैयाँ, रैछौ जालि ओ सैयाँ, ताम्रा मिठा बोलिमा फसिग्या, ओ सैयाँ।

 बैतडीकी बसन्ती जसी दङग भए तेरो रुपरङग धेकी
 क्याई है मुलाई हेरेकि हेरेई ब!  तु त मेरी Fan भयेजसी
 सैयाका बजेराठ जमानाका सौकार चर्चा बताए यामुणी 
 होइझान्छ चौताल, घण्टी बजुन्थ्यो फोनमा Attend नगरेले ढलुन्थ्यो सरकार  भुणेको मेरो माण्णीकन बेडापार होलो तेरो जाण्णीकन मौका आउदैन फर्केर रानिबनी बसली सुण्णीकन
 मुईबिना कसरी बाचली भुणदिन्छु आज मेरा मनकी बोली 
 Collage Time माई पडिगैथ्यो Love जब धेक्या थे तेरी
 आखी काली.........

मेरा आँखा काली काली, मेरा आँखामा गजली, मेरा सैयाँ वन्डरफुल, 
मुई त सैयाँकी दिलवाली x 2

ja.title: FCモバイルで最速のチームを作りました！
ja.description:
FCモバイルで今一番速いチームを作ったんだけど、ちょっとひねりがあるんだ！各ポジションで一番速い選手トップ3を予想しないといけない。間違えたら一番遅い選手を使わなきゃいけない！😱⚡ 目標OVRは122。OVRが122に満たないたびにスターパスをプレゼント！さらに、負けるたびにランダムで選手が1人外される！🔥

ml.title: എഫ്‌സി മൊബൈലിലെ ഏറ്റവും വേഗതയേറിയ ടീമിനെ നിർമ്മിച്ചത് ഞാനാണ്!
ml.description:
എഫ്‌സി മൊബൈലിൽ ഇപ്പോൾ ഞാൻ ഏറ്റവും വേഗതയേറിയ ടീമിനെ നിർമ്മിച്ചു - പക്ഷേ ഒരു ട്വിസ്റ്റ് ഉണ്ട്! ഓരോ പൊസിഷനിലും ഏറ്റവും വേഗതയേറിയ 3 കളിക്കാരെ ഞാൻ ഊഹിക്കേണ്ടതുണ്ട്, അല്ലെങ്കിൽ പകരം ഏറ്റവും വേഗതയേറിയ കളിക്കാരനെ ഉപയോഗിക്കാൻ ഞാൻ നിർബന്ധിതനാകും! 😱⚡ ടാർഗെറ്റ് OVR 122 ആണ് - ഓരോ OVR ഷോർട്ടും ഒരു സ്റ്റാർ പാസ് സമ്മാനം എന്നാണ് അർത്ഥമാക്കുന്നത്, ഞാൻ തോൽക്കുന്ന ഓരോ ഗോളും ഒരു റാൻഡം കളിക്കാരനെ പുറത്താക്കുന്നു എന്നാണ് അർത്ഥമാക്കുന്നത്! 🔥

🎁 സമ്മാനം — 3 സ്റ്റാർ പാസുകൾ നേടൂ!
👍 ഈ വീഡിയോ ലൈക്ക് ചെയ്യുക
🔔 എന്റെ ചാനൽ സബ്സ്ക്രൈബ് ചെയ്യുക
💬 നിങ്ങളുടെ ടീമിലെ ഏറ്റവും വേഗതയേറിയ കളിക്കാരനെ കമന്റ് ചെയ്യുക!
🏆 12,500 ലൈക്കുകളിൽ വിജയികളെ പ്രഖ്യാപിച്ചു!

🔔 സബ്സ്ക്രൈബ് ചെയ്ത് 3 ദശലക്ഷം സബ്സ്ക്രൈബർമാരിൽ എത്താൻ എന്നെ സഹായിക്കൂ!

⏱️ TIMESTAMPS

bn.title: আমি এফসি মোবাইলে দ্রুততম দলটি তৈরি করেছি!
bn.description:
আমি এই মুহূর্তে FC Mobile-এর সবচেয়ে দ্রুতগতির টিমটি তৈরি করেছি — কিন্তু এখানে একটি টুইস্ট আছে! আমাকে প্রতিটি পজিশনের সবচেয়ে দ্রুতগতির ৩ জন খেলোয়াড়কে অনুমান করতে হবে, নাহলে আমাকে সবচেয়ে ধীরগতির খেলোয়াড়কে ব্যবহার করতে বাধ্য হতে হবে! 😱⚡ টার্গেট OVR হলো ১২২ — প্রতি OVR কম হলে একটি স্টার পাস গিভঅ্যাওয়ে হবে এবং প্রতি গোলে হারলে র‍্যান্ডমভাবে একজন খেলোয়াড় ডিসকার্ড হয়ে যাবে! 🔥

🎁 গিভঅ্যাওয়ে — ৩টি স্টার পাস জিতে নিন!

👍 এই ভিডিওটি লাইক করুন
🔔 আমার চ্যানেল সাবস্ক্রাইব করুন
💬 আপনার টিমের সবচেয়ে দ্রুতগতির খেলোয়াড়ের নাম কমেন্ট করুন!

🏆 ১২,৫০০ লাইক হলে বিজয়ীদের নাম ঘোষণা করা হবে!

🔔 সাবস্ক্রাইব করুন এবং আমাকে ৩ মিলিয়ন সাবস্ক্রাইবারে পৌঁছাতে সাহায্য করুন!

⏱️ টাইমস্ট্যাম্প
০০:০০ — চ্যালেঞ্জের নিয়ম ও টার্গেট OVR
০০:৫৩ — ৪-২-৪ ফর্মেশনের ব্যাখ্যা
০১:২০ — ডান উইং: শেভচেঙ্কো ⚡
০২:৩৮ — স্ট্রাইকার: এমবাপে ও হার্স্ট 🔥
০৩:৩৩ — বাম উইং: রোনাল্ডো 🐐
০৪:২০ — মিডফিল্ড নিয়ে অনুমান 😬
০৫:৩৯ — ভুল অনুমান — সবচেয়ে ধীরগতির খেলোয়াড়! 💀
০৬:৩৯ — রাইট ব্যাক: কাফু
০৭:৩০ — লেফট ব্যাক: থিও হার্নান্দেজ ✅
০৮:১৬ — সেন্টার ব্যাক: কার্লোস আলবার্তো ও মালদিনি 🛡️
০৯:৩৬ — গোলকিপার: ক্যাম্পোস ✅
১০:৩১ — ফাইনাল OVR চেক 😱
১০:৫৬ — হেড-টু-হেড ম্যাচ — ডিসকার্ড চ্যালেঞ্জ ⚽

snippet.title: Zihaal e Miskin (Video) Vishal Mishra, Shreya Ghoshal|Rohit Zinjurke, Nimrit Ahluwalia|Javed-Mohsin
snippet.description:
Presenting the official video of Zihaal e Miskin - the heartbreak song of the season. Featuring Rohit Zinjurke and Nimrit Ahluwalia, this melody has been sung by Vishal Mishra & Shreya Ghoshal, music by Javed-Mohsin And lyrics by Kunaal Vermaa.

#ZihaaleMiskin #RohitZinjurke #NimritKaurAhluwalia  

Create reels on Zihaal e Miskin : https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/605950694837426/

Listen to "Zihaal e Miskin" on:

🎧 Spotify : https://open.spotify.com/track/51DEaelXeJJ6cFFYbX8Hal 
🎧 JioSaavn : https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/zihaal-e-miskin/OQAgUxlXTmM
🎧 Wynk Music : https://wynk.in/u/W7uyGgqk2

🎧  Audio Credits

➟ Music Composer : Javed - Mohsin
➟ Singers : Vishal Mishra & Shreya Ghoshal
➟ Lyrics by : Kunaal Vermaa

Music Team :
➟ Theme written & composed by : Javed-Mohsin
➟ Music Produced by : Jackie Vanjari
➟ Additional Vocals : Arsh Mohammed , Subodhh Sharma , Ravi Mishra , Sam Chandel , Sameer Khan Royal & Aman Khan
➟ Indian Rhythm By : Raju Sardar & Team
➟  Dholak & Tabla : Sanjeev Sen, Firoz Khan, Tahir Hasan, Naeem Sayyed, Mushtaq khan, Ishteyak Khan, Mohammed Shadab & Zuber Hussain Warsi
➟ All Live Guitar’s Played By : Shomu Seal

➟ Live Strings Performed By : Bombay Strings

➟ Violins Played by : Prakash Varma, Shushil Varma, Neville Franco, Abhijit Mazumdar, Dharmendra Jawda, Jitendra Jawda, Chander Makwana, Dilshad Ahmed, Sanjeev Rao, Shyam Jawda, Dilip Bose, Mahendra Bedi, Chandan Singh Jawda, Raju Padhiyar.

➟ Viola’s Played by : Sushil Varma ,Sanjay Varma ,Dharmendra jawda ,Jitendra jawda ,Mohan Goyal ,Chander Makwana, Prabhat Kishore ,Sandeep Thakur.

➟ Percussions & Side Rhythm played by : Satyajit Jamsandekar
➟ All Live Strokes Played By : Tapas Roy
➟ Song Recorded @ Studio 504 By : Rahul M Sharma & Asst. by Samir Dharap
➟ Javed-Mohsin’s Assistant : Subodhh Sharma , Abdulla Khan , Sameer K Royal.
➟ Shreya Ghoshal’s Vocals Recorded @ wow&flutter studio by Mr. Tanay Gajjar
➟ Vishal Mishra’s Vocals Recorded @ Vishal Mishra’s studio
➟ Vocals conducted by Subodhh Sharma

➟ Special Thanks : Lijo George
➟ Mixed & Mastered By : Eric Pillai @FSOB Studios
➟ Assistant Mix Engineer : Michael Edwin Pillai

📝 Lyrics

Yaad Rakhunga Main Ye
Bewafaai Yaar Mere 
Sirf Lagi Chaahat Mein
Tanhaai Haath Mere

Main Dil Ko Samjhaa Lunga
Main Dil Ko Samjhaa Lunga
Tu Khayaal Tera Rakhna

Zihaal-E-Muskin Makun Ba-Ranjish
Bahaale Hijra Bechara Dil Hai
Sunaayi Deti Hai Jiski Dhadkan
Tumhara Dil Ya Hamara Dil Hai

Zihaal-E-Muskin Makun Ba-Ranjish
Bahaale Hijra Bechara Dil Hai
Sunaayi Deti Hai Jiski Dhadkan
Tumhara Dil Ya Hamara Dil Hai

Tootey Dil Ko Jodein Kaise
Ye Bataate Jaao
Zinda Rehne Ki Bas Humko Ek Wajah De Jaao

Yun Na Phero Humse Ankhein To Milaate Jaao
Koi Waada Kar Jaao Koi Duaa De Jaao

Mere Liye Thodi Si
Mere Liye Thodi Si
Dil Mein To Jagah Rakhna

Khushi Tumhaari Hai Jab Isi Mein
To Hum Bhi Aasu Chupa Hi Lenge
Wajah Jo Poochega Ye Zamaana
Koi Bahaana Bana Hi Lenge

Chaahe Jo Tu Paaye Vo Tu
Ye Meri Fariyaad Hai
Jeelein Chaahe Tum Bin Yaara
Hona To Barbaad Hai
Jab Tak Na Mar Jaayein Hum
Us Pal Ka Intzaar Hai
